title: Environmental Mover
description: A utility mod that uses special machines powered by RF to absorb and move biomes!
body:
A small mod that allows you to power machines that can absorb and move biomes in the world!

 

Blocks:

  • Biome Absorber: Takes in an empty biome container and RF to produce a filled biome container based on what biome the block is in.
  • Biome Applicator: Uses power to paint the blocks around it in the biome contained within the filled biome container.

 

Items:

  • Empty Biome Container: An item used for containing a biome. Upon crafting, these are empty. Place them in a Biome Absorber to fill them with a biome.
  • Filled Biome Container: An item that contains a biome. The four points on the item represents the biome's sky color, water color, fog color and foliage color by default, but can be changed in the item's NBT.
  • Terrastar: By default, this is a crafting ingredient for the Biome Applicator. This special item requires specific filled biome containers in order to craft it.

 

Compatabilities:

  • JEI (Optional) - Shows the power requirements for absorbing a biome and painting it, as well as the special recipe for the Terrastar
  • Patchouli (Required)- Internal guide on how to use the mod

 

Extra Info:

  • The amount of energy used to extract/distribute a biome can be edited with datapacks (/reload command is your friend!)
  • Using the "see recipes" and "see uses" keys from JEI on the biome containers shows you extra information about them!
  • Colors for the item can be changed in the item's NBT tags
